jp: Hey
Hey
Hey
深く眠れるかい
傷は癒せたかい
夜が寂しいからって無理して誰かを愛さないで
夢を見る事だって
咽び泣く事だって
知りもしないまま死んでみたって
上手に隠れたかい
息は潜めたかい
今が苦しいからって無理して自分を変えないで
勇敢な蛮人だって
悩める子羊だって
回り道して生きているって
目立たないように
(Yeah, yeah) 堪えられるように
(Yeah, yeah) 思考回路はまだ止めないように
今宵 run away, run away 嘘みたいだ
誰かこの手 掴んでくれよ
見えない明日は来なくていい
今はただ 眠りたい
Hey
呼べば聴こえてるかい
歩き始めるかい
心砕かれたって無理して虚勢を張ってんだ
鼓動を打ち鳴らそうぜ
声を張り上げようぜ
ウザい世間に見せつけるように
止まらないように
(Yeah, yeah) 揺るぎないように
(Yeah, yeah) 自分自身はまだ捨てないように
今宵 live and die, live and die 夢みたいな
子守唄を歌ってくれよ
儚い朝は来なくていい
もう少し 眠りたい
生きる術とは クソみたいな
愛情 友情 押し付けんじゃねぇよ
悔し泣いて 口遊んだ歌は 誰の歌だろう (yeah!)
今宵 run away, run away 嘘みたいだ
誰かこの手 掴んでくれよ
見えない明日は来なくていい
今はただ 眠りたい
眠りたいだけさ
(Live and die, live and die 夢みたいだ)
Oh 眠りたい
Hey
Hey
Hey
en: Hey
Hey
Hey
Are you sleeping deeply?
Have your wounds healed?
Don't force yourself to love someone just because the night is lonely
Even dreaming a dream,
even sobbing your heart out,
even dying without ever having known—
Are you hiding well?
Have you held your breath?
Don't force yourself to change just because right now is hard
Even brave barbarians,
even troubled lambs,
are taking the long way around to live
trying not to stand out
(Yeah, yeah) trying to endure it
(Yeah, yeah) trying not to shut the thinking circuits down yet
Tonight, run away, run away—it feels like a lie
Somebody, take this hand of mine
An invisible tomorrow doesn't have to come
Right now I just want to sleep
Hey
Can you hear me when I call?
Will you start walking?
Even with my heart shattered, I'm putting up a forced front
Let's sound out our heartbeats
Let's raise our voices
as if to flaunt them at this annoying world,
as if not to stop
(Yeah, yeah) trying to be unshakable
(Yeah, yeah) trying not to throw myself away yet
Tonight, live and die, live and die—a dreamlike
lullaby, sing one for me
A fleeting morning doesn't have to come
Just a little longer—I want to sleep
Crap-ass things you call "how to live,"
love, friendship—stop forcing them on me
Crying tears of frustration, the song I hummed—whose song is it? (yeah!)
Tonight, run away, run away—it feels like a lie
Somebody, take this hand of mine
An invisible tomorrow doesn't have to come
Right now I just want to sleep
I just want to sleep
(Live and die, live and die—it's like a dream)
Oh, I want to sleep
Hey
Hey
Hey

jp: 虚実を切り裂いて 蒼天を仰いで 飛び立った永久
空に歌えば 後悔も否応無く
必然 必然 なるべくしてなる未来だ それ故、足掻け
蜃気楼 涙の川を漕ぎ出して 幾星霜
さよなら 行かざるを得ない 何を失ったとて
忘れない 悔しさも 屈辱も
胸に飾って
虚実を切り裂いて 蒼天を仰いで 飛び立った永久
空に歌えば 後悔も否応無く
必然 必然 断ち切るには眩し過ぎた 未来へ、足掻け
人を傷つけずには 本懐は遂げられず
失って構わないと思える 理想が道しるべ
笑うなら 笑ってよ 嘲笑も
道連れにして
あの日の君の声 言いたかった事 言えなかった事
空に歌えば 後悔を振り切って
必然 必然 投げ出すには背負いすぎた それ故、足掻け
苦悩は一陣の驟雨となりて 行かすものかと足にすがる嘲笑の泥濘
雨雲に幽閉 隔離された空 捕縛された暗がりからの逃走
掴んだものはすぐにすり抜けた 信じたものは呆気なく過ぎ去った
それでも、それらが残していった、この温みだけで この人生は生きるに値する
失意の濁流を抜けて 曇天から射す一条の光
その時、既にもう 雨は上がっていた
虚実を切り裂いて 蒼天を仰いで 飛び立った永久
空に歌えば
あの日なにか叫んでた君の声 言いたかった事 言えなかった事
空に歌えば 後悔も連れ立って
必然 必然 終わらすには失くしすぎた それ故、足掻け
有限 有限 残り僅かな未来だ それ故、足掻け
en: Tearing through truth and lies, gazing up at the blue sky, an eternity took flight
If I sing to the sky, regret comes whether I want it or not
Inevitable, inevitable—a future that was always going to be. So fight on
A mirage—rowing out across a river of tears, year upon year
Goodbye—there's no choice but to go on, no matter what's been lost
I won't forget—the bitterness, the humiliation,
I'll wear them on my chest
Tearing through truth and lies, gazing up at the blue sky, an eternity took flight
If I sing to the sky, regret comes whether I want it or not
Inevitable, inevitable—too dazzling to cut off—on toward the future, fight on
Without hurting someone, your true purpose can't be achieved
An ideal you'd be willing to lose for is the signpost on the road
If you're going to laugh, then laugh—I'll take the mockery
along for the ride too
Your voice that day—the things you wanted to say, the things you couldn't—
if I sing to the sky, I shake regret loose
Inevitable, inevitable—too much carried to throw it away. So fight on
Anguish becomes a sudden squall—mockery's mire clings to your feet, refusing to let you pass
Imprisoned in rain clouds, the sky cut off—escape from a captured dark
What I grasped slipped through me at once; what I believed in passed away in an instant
Even so, just from the warmth they left behind—this life is worth living
Out of the muddy current of despair, a single ray of light shafting through cloudy skies
By that moment, the rain had already lifted
Tearing through truth and lies, gazing up at the blue sky, an eternity took flight
If I sing to the sky—
Your voice shouting something that day—the things you wanted to say, the things you couldn't—
if I sing to the sky, regret comes along too
Inevitable, inevitable—too much lost to bring it to an end. So fight on
Finite, finite—a future with little time left. So fight on
